description: Triggered server-side when a new workspace owner successfully signs up and their workspace is bootstrapped.
Triggered client-side when a user successfully signs in from the login page.
Triggered client-side when a new user finishes the onboarding wizard and launches their dashboard.
Triggered client-side on the public booking page when a client submits the booking form.
Triggered server-side when a public booking is successfully created in the database.
Triggered client-side on the inquiry form page when a client submits an inquiry.
Triggered server-side when a public inquiry is successfully saved to the database.
Triggered server-side via Stripe webhook when a checkout.session.completed event marks an invoice as paid.
Triggered client-side in the dashboard when a new invoice or quote is created by the workspace owner.
Triggered client-side in the dashboard when a new booking is manually created by the workspace owner.
